question: Create a file named /tmp/greeting.txt containing exactly the line 'AP Hogeslab'.
hint: You can use echo or cat to write the file.
validation_script: #!/bin/bash\nif [ -f /tmp/greeting.txt ] && [ "$(cat /tmp/greeting.txt)" = "AP Hogeslab" ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Install the 'tree' package using the system's package manager.
hint: On Rocky Linux use dnf install -y tree.
validation_script: #!/bin/bash\nif command -v tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Create a user named 'apstudent' with a home directory and set the default shell to /bin/bash.
validation_script: #!/bin/bash\nif id apstudent &>/dev/null && [ -d /home/apstudent ] && getent passwd apstudent | cut -d: -f7 | grep -qx '/bin/bash'; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Configure the SSH daemon to allow password authentication and then restart the sshd service.
hint: Set PasswordAuthentication yes in /etc/ssh/sshd_config and run systemctl restart sshd.
validation_script: #!/bin/bash\nif grep -i '^PasswordAuthentication' /etc/ssh/sshd_config | grep -qi 'yes' && systemctl is-active sshd | grep -q active; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Set up a cron job that runs every minute and appends the current timestamp to /var/log/apcron.log.
hint: Use crontab -e to add an entry like '* * * * * date >> /var/log/apcron.log'.
validation_script: #!/bin/bash\nif crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '/var/log/apcron.log' && [ -f /var/log/apcron.log ] && find /var/log/apcron.log -mmin -2 -readable | grep -q .; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi
